data.gate3_platform_risk_label: Heavy dependency on a restrictive platform with documented enforcement history
data.verdict: Gate 3 platform-dependency risk: 4/5 — Heavy dependency on a restrictive platform with documented enforcement history. Detected 3 platform deps: Apple Screen Time API, Android platform APIs, App Store. Restrictive history: Apple Screen Time API, Android platform APIs, App Store. 15 recent ToS / policy signal(s) surfaced. 10 founder retro(s) surfaced — read before committing. Treat Gate 3 as likely FAIL on dependency risk alone unless a credible multi-platform fallback exists.

confidence_note: Detection: explicit_input → 3 platform(s). Serper: live; 6 fan-out calls fired (3 platforms × 2 families: ToS + retros). Source mix: 3 independent, 6 conflicted.
